access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Effect of tadalafil on anaerobic performance indices in healthy athletes.
summary: Double-blind randomized crossover study in 12 well-trained subjects testing tadalafil 20 mg versus placebo before a 30-second Wingate anaerobic power test, measuring mean power, peak power, time to peak power, fatigue index, and recovery lactate.
